quick_skim.title: Boundedness of Left Half-Plane Eigenvalues for Non-Selfadjoint Indefinite Sturm--Liouville Problems with Applications to Fourier Modal Methods
quick_skim.abstract: We study a general class of non-selfadjoint indefinite Sturm--Liouville problems of the form $$ -(p\,y')' + q\,y = λ\, p\, y, $$ on a finite interval with complex-valued coefficients, where $p$ is piecewise in $W^{2,\infty}$, non-vanishing, and satisfies a non-degenerate interface condition, and $q$ is bounded. We prove that all eigenvalues in the open left half-plane are contained in a bounded set, which, by classical Sturm--Liouville theory, implies their finiteness. A prominent instance of this class arises in the lamellar grating diffraction problem with transverse-magnetic (TM) polarization, where $p=ε(x)^{-1}$ is the inverse of a spatially varying permittivity profile. Our result provides a simple and rigorous criterion for identifying non-physical spurious modes in low-loss metallic gratings -- a notorious source of instability in Fourier modal methods. Numerical examples illustrate the practical utility of the criterion.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Mathematical results for Fourier modal methods applied to lamellar grating diffraction, relevant to diffractive optical waveguide analysis.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 针对层状光栅衍射问题的傅里叶模态方法的数学结果，与衍射光波导分析相关。
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 针对层状光栅衍射问题的傅里叶模态方法的数学结果，与衍射光波导分析相关。
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 针对层状光栅衍射问题的傅里叶模态方法的数学结果，与衍射光波导分析相关。
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper proves boundedness of eigenvalues for a class of Sturm-Liouville problems that arise in the Fourier modal method for lamellar grating diffraction, ensuring finite number of unstable modes and validating numerical methods for diffractive optics.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文研究了一类非自伴不定Sturm-Liouville问题，证明其左半平面特征值有界，从而保证不稳定模态数量有限。这一结果直接适用于层状光栅衍射的傅里叶模态方法，为衍射光波导等周期结构的严格数值模拟提供了数学基础，有助于提升增强现实近眼显示中光栅设计的可靠性和效率。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文研究了一类非自伴不定Sturm-Liouville问题，证明其左半平面特征值有界，从而保证不稳定模态数量有限。这一结果直接适用于层状光栅衍射的傅里叶模态方法，为衍射光波导等周期结构的严格数值模拟提供了数学基础，有助于提升增强现实近眼显示中光栅设计的可靠性和效率。

quick_skim.title: AmbientEye: A Dataset for Pupil Segmentation under Natural Ambient Infrared Illumination
quick_skim.abstract: Eye tracking is essential for smart glasses, as it provides insight into user attention for ambient intelligence applications. However, most existing eye-tracking systems rely on active infrared (IR) illumination, creating practical barriers to all-day outdoor use due to power consumption. In this paper, we investigate whether passive IR cameras alone, without any active IR light source, can enable reliable pupil detection in unconstrained outdoor environments, where ambient sunlight serves as the sole illumination source. To support this investigation, we introduce AmbientEye, a large-scale dataset of 2,606,225 eye images collected from 35 participants from 19 countries. It is captured outdoors under natural sunlight with two off-axis camera configurations and two sun-orientation conditions. We provide high-quality pupil annotation through SAM2 automatic segmentation, followed by refinement by human annotators. We benchmark a state-of-the-art pupil segmentation algorithm on our dataset and compare its performance with that on existing datasets under controlled IR illumination. Results reveal a substantial drop in pupil segmentation performance from 0.928 on controlled IR datasets to 0.767 on AmbientEye. This performance gap highlights the challenge of the ambient-light setting. This positions AmbientEye as a first benchmark for an unexplored and highly practical eye-tracking scenario.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Provides a large-scale pupil dataset under natural ambient IR, useful for pupil diameter measurement in perceived brightness models.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 提供自然环境红外光下的大规模瞳孔数据集，可用于感知亮度模型中的瞳孔直径测量。
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 提供自然环境红外光下的大规模瞳孔数据集，可用于感知亮度模型中的瞳孔直径测量。
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 提供自然环境红外光下的大规模瞳孔数据集，可用于感知亮度模型中的瞳孔直径测量。
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Introduces AmbientEye, a 2.6M natural-sunlight eye image dataset for passive pupil segmentation, facilitating outdoor eye tracking and pupil-based perceived brightness research.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对眼动追踪依赖主动红外照明、户外使用受限的问题，利用被动红外相机和自然日光构建大规模AmbientEye数据集，含260万张眼图，验证了自然光照下瞳孔检测的可行性。该方法和数据为基于瞳孔直径的显示感知亮度模型提供了重要测量基础，有助于推进AR等设备的视觉舒适度研究。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对眼动追踪依赖主动红外照明、户外使用受限的问题，利用被动红外相机和自然日光构建大规模AmbientEye数据集，含260万张眼图，验证了自然光照下瞳孔检测的可行性。该方法和数据为基于瞳孔直径的显示感知亮度模型提供了重要测量基础，有助于推进AR等设备的视觉舒适度研究。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Find literature on perceived display brightness models using pupil diameter, retinal imaging, ambient illumination, and visual comfort for AR, OLED, or mobile displays.
